content:
[{'text': "I'm back in the white corridor at (11.13, 7.90). The map shows the robot is near the right edge of the middle corridor. The green destination is in the upper corridor. 

Looking at the map image carefully, I notice the map has three horizontal white corridors. The black walls between them appear solid in the visible area. The passage between corridors might be on the far right side of the map (beyond x=11.51). Let me try rotating right (to face right/+X) and move further right to find a passage.

Actually, wait - looking at the coordinates again: the destination is at (11.51, 13.67). The map appears to be cut off on the right. The passage might be just beyond the right edge of the current view. Let me try moving right a bit more.", 'type': 'text'}, {'id': 'toolu_01NbakMbTa58WhZRsXAJzHUR', 'caller': {'type': 'direct'}, 'input': {'angle_degrees': -90}, 'name': 'rotate', 'type': 'tool_use'}]
